what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-source image asset named company-info/p-05, storing its identity, channel, blob reference, MIME type, authorship, and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type image/jpeg, name p-05, zero width and height, source design_source_material, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links.
Body line labels the entry as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-05.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 for an image/jpeg entry.
Links array is empty, giving no related ledger entries.
The blob is referenced by a content-addressed URI (blob://b2:...).
concerns: Zero width/height may indicate missing or unvalidated image dimensions.
No descriptive text about what the image depicts.
No links to related design or company-info entries.
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a design-source JPEG whose dimensions have not been captured.
questions: What visual content does company-info/p-05.jpg contain?
Should this record link to related company-info pages or design artifacts?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a SOURCE design ground-truth image record; the file matches that purpose, though it lacks image dimensions and descriptive context.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a stable, retrievable identity for a design-source image so it can be referenced within the company channel-memory ledger.
contribution: Provides a canonical identity, channel address, and content-addressed blob reference for an image asset, which a fused system could use to locate and reconcile the underlying design-source file.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for the design-source JPEG image company-info/p-05 with metadata, blob reference, and zero recorded dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make addressable a source design image within the company-info design-source channel.
